rationale: Thin description; Improvement implementing spec clarification for empty authSource per DRIVERS-808.
Fixing listIndexNames.json test expectations to reference correct command name listIndexes; DRIVERS-748.
Improvement implementing new CRUD pipeline update feature per DRIVERS-626; driver not previously wrong.
Improvement implementing spec change not to send $readPreference to standalones per DRIVERS-664 spec commit.
Fixing tests broken by async-std 1.6.x upgrade; no spec behavior involved.
Rust lifetime/type system bug in from_bson generic bound; language-specific API ergonomics, no spec rule violated.
Auditing public structs/enums to mark non_exhaustive; Rust API stability, no spec involvement.
Concurrent queries corrupt internal state causing response field mismatches; concurrency implementation bug.
User suggestion to trim redundant subtype data from Binary serialization; speculative optimization, no spec requirement.
Failing connection not closed after invalid server reply; implementation bug, no specific spec rule cited in description.
Test runner ignores 'hosts' field per DNS seedlist test README; incomplete test implementation, not a driver bug.
Adding auth spec test cases for authSource without username per DRIVERS-949; test infrastructure addition.
Improvement implementing new speculative auth in isMaster per DRIVERS-918; new feature, driver not previously wrong.
Updating retryable writes test to specify error labels per DRIVERS-1356; test infrastructure update.
Excluding test/extra files from compiled library; build/packaging improvement.
Server selection timeout connecting to AWS DocumentDB; user environment/compatibility issue, not a spec violation.
Empty description; allow lower minHeartbeatFrequencyMS for testing; insufficient detail to classify.
Response deserialization failures under heavy load; internal concurrency/response-demux bug, not a spec violation.
Sync API missing ClientOptions; API completeness gap, no spec requirement violated.
Improvement implementing $uuid Extended JSON parsing per DRIVERS-848; new spec feature, not a prior nonconformance.
Adding BSON timestamp spec test with high-order bit per DRIVERS-1319; test infrastructure addition.
Description quotes CMAP: 'Pool MUST NOT block other threads from checking out connections'; driver held lock during establishment.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1042; proactive spec rollout for event ordering, driver not previously wrong.
Improvement implementing PLAIN auth mechanism; empty description; new feature, not a bug.
minPoolSize URI value accidentally assigned to max_pool_size field; wrong pool option routing violates URI/CMAP spec.
Query hang with actix-web async runtime; Rust runtime interaction issue, no spec behavior violated.
async-std tests hitting max file limit on macOS CI; resource/CI issue, no spec involvement.
CMAP defines ConnectionClosedReason::Error; driver always uses 'stale' instead when network error causes closure.
SDAM spec defines heartbeatFrequencyMS behavior; monitors wake every minHeartbeatFrequencyMS ignoring heartbeatFrequencyMS.
Unreproducible flaky CMAP spec test failure; tracking ticket with no identified spec violation.
Automating driver releases per DRIVERS-1383; release process improvement, no spec involvement.
Driver propagates client default writeConcern to count command; write concern spec prohibits sending it on read operations.
Race condition in topology update causes monitors to overwrite each other's results; concurrency implementation bug.
BSON serde tests not compiled due to missing module declaration; fixing test infrastructure gap.
Improvement to deserialize ObjectId from hex string in addition to extended JSON; usability enhancement, not a spec requirement.
Description cites MongoDB handshake spec: monitors required to handshake; monitors skip it, also violating SDAM integration tests.
Upgrading typed-builder Rust dependency; internal dependency management.
CMAP spec test runner executes threaded operations out of spec-defined order; fixing test runner behavior.
Removing BSON CI jobs from Travis CI per DRIVERS-1521; CI configuration change.
Adding spec tests for invalid relaxed UUIDs per DRIVERS-1526; test infrastructure addition.
Monitoring threads hold strong references preventing shutdown on client drop; lifecycle implementation bug.
Improvement implementing server session discard on network errors per DRIVERS-649; new spec requirement.
Race between topology update subscription and server selection; concurrency implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Switching from err-derive to thiserror crate; internal dependency management.
Replacing deprecated time::PreciseTime with std::time::Instant; internal refactor.
Integer underflow in BSON array and binary deserialization causes incorrect parsing; violates BSON encoding spec.
Removing Arc wrapper from Error type to simplify pattern matching; internal API refactor.
Fixing clippy lint for incorrect ServerType enum variant casing; code style fix.
Updating rustfmt config to use imports_granularity=Crate; code style fix.
Description quotes CRUD spec requiring update vs replace validation; driver missing enforcement of atomic modifier presence.
